/usr/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -flto -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o student_agent_module.cpython-312-darwin.so CMakeFiles/student_agent_module.dir/student_agent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/student_agent_module.dir/game_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/student_agent_module.dir/minimax.cpp.o CMakeFiles/student_agent_module.dir/mcts.cpp.o CMakeFiles/student_agent_module.dir/heuristics.cpp.o
